title: 「Adjective + with / without」句型
titleEn: Using adjective + with / without for conditions and degree

source.file: Sentence Structure 102 -「Adjective + with _ without」描述條件與程度.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + linking verb + adjective + with + noun phrase

formulas.labelEn: A state created by a condition
formulas.labelZh: 描述某項條件帶來的狀態
formulas.formula: Subject + linking verb + adjective + with + noun phrase

formulas.labelZh: 描述程度隨某項因素而改變
formulas.formula: Subject + get / become / grow + comparative adjective + with + noun phrase

formulas.labelZh: 表達缺少某項必要條件
formulas.formula: Subject + linking verb + adjective + without + noun phrase

example: Bookings get more expensive with more participants.
exampleZh: 參加者越多，預訂費用就會越昂貴。

examples.en: Bookings get more expensive with more participants.
examples.zh: 參加者越多，預訂費用就會越昂貴。

examples.en: The wine’s aroma becomes more pronounced with longer breathing time.
examples.zh: 葡萄酒的香氣會隨着醒酒時間延長而變得更明顯。
examples.highlight: more pronounced with longer breathing time

examples.en: Deep understanding is impossible without effort.
examples.zh: 沒有努力，就不可能有深入的理解。

meaning.zh: 形容詞後接 with 可指出影響狀態或程度的條件；接 without 則指出缺少某項條件時的狀態。

rules.zh: With 後面接名詞或名詞詞組，不要直接使用完整句子。
rules.en: Follow with with a noun or noun phrase, not a complete clause.

rules.zh: Without 表示缺少某項條件，常可改寫 if there is no、if someone does not have、when something is unavailable 或 unless something is provided。
rules.en: Without expresses a missing condition and often corresponds to if there is no, if someone does not have, when something is unavailable or unless something is provided.
examples: The plan is impossible without enough time.

rules.zh: 程度發生變化時通常使用比較級；短形容詞加 -er，較長形容詞使用 more 或 less。
rules.en: When degree changes, normally use a comparative: add -er to short adjectives and use more or less with longer adjectives.

rules.zh: With 可表示伴隨條件、環境或影響因素，不一定表示唯一或直接原因。
rules.en: With may introduce an accompanying condition, environment or influence and does not necessarily identify the only or direct cause.
examples: The room is quieter with soundproof windows.

rules.zh: 使用 without 時要保留原句的否定程度，例如 unreliable 不可擅自加強為 impossible。
rules.en: When using without, preserve the original degree of negativity; for example, do not strengthen unreliable into impossible.
examples: An experiment is unreliable without accurate measurements.

rules.zh: The more..., the more... 結構經常可以改寫成比較級形容詞 + with 的句子。
rules.en: A the more..., the more... structure can often be rewritten with a comparative adjective + with.
examples: The wine’s aroma becomes more pronounced with longer breathing time.

benefits.zh: 把一項特質和影響該特質的條件直接連接，讓讀者立即看出兩者關係。
benefits.en: It directly connects a quality with the condition affecting it.

benefits.zh: 可以更簡潔地描述人數、時間、需求或投入增加時的趨勢和程度變化。
benefits.en: It describes changes in trend or degree more concisely as numbers, time, demand or input increase.

benefits.zh: Without 能直接指出缺少哪項必要條件便會令事情困難、無效、不安全或不可能。
benefits.en: Without directly identifies the missing condition that makes something difficult, ineffective, unsafe or impossible.

benefits.zh: 這個句型適合描述成本、需求、效率、安全、可靠程度、政策成效和研究可信度。
benefits.en: The structure suits writing about cost, demand, efficiency, safety, reliability, policy effectiveness and research validity.

benefits.zh: 它提供 because、when、if 和 as 以外的自然表達方法，增加句式變化。
benefits.en: It offers a natural alternative to repeatedly using because, when, if and as.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using an adjective followed by with or without.
You may need to change a verb or an adverb into an adjective. Preserve the original meaning and degree.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用「形容詞＋with」或「形容詞＋without」改寫以下句子。
你可能需要把動詞或副詞改為形容詞。答案必須保留原句的意思和程度。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The room receives more sunlight, so it is brighter.
questions.promptZh: 房間得到更多陽光，因此更加明亮。
questions.answer: The room is brighter with more sunlight.
questions.answerZh: 房間有更多陽光時會更加明亮。
questions.highlight: The room is brighter with more sunlight.

questions.prompt: Fresh herbs make the soup taste better.
questions.promptZh: 新鮮香草令湯的味道更佳。
questions.answer: Soup tastes better with fresh herbs.
questions.answerZh: 湯加入新鮮香草後味道更佳。
questions.highlight: Soup tastes better with fresh herbs.

questions.prompt: If the lighting is improved, the road is safer.
questions.promptZh: 如果照明得到改善，道路會更安全。
questions.answer: The road is safer with better lighting.
questions.answerZh: 道路有更好的照明時會更安全。
questions.highlight: The road is safer with better lighting.

questions.prompt: Clear instructions make the task easier.
questions.promptZh: 清晰的指示令任務更容易完成。
questions.answer: The task is easier with clear instructions.
questions.answerZh: 有清晰指示時，任務會更容易完成。
questions.highlight: The task is easier with clear instructions.

questions.prompt: Regular watering makes the garden look healthier.
questions.promptZh: 定期澆水令花園看起來更有生氣。
questions.answer: The garden looks healthier with regular watering.
questions.answerZh: 花園在定期澆水下看起來更有生氣。
questions.highlight: The garden looks healthier with regular watering.

questions.prompt: A phone cannot be used if it has no power.
questions.promptZh: 如果電話沒有電力，便無法使用。
questions.answer: A phone is useless without power.
questions.answerZh: 電話沒有電力便毫無用處。
questions.highlight: A phone is useless without power.

questions.prompt: Why is the lesson difficult? It does not include any examples.
questions.promptZh: 為甚麼這一課很難？因為當中沒有任何例子。
questions.answer: The lesson is difficult without examples.
questions.answerZh: 沒有例子時，這一課會較難。
questions.highlight: The lesson is difficult without examples.

questions.prompt: The journey is uncomfortable if you do not have enough water.
questions.promptZh: 如果你沒有足夠的水，這段旅程會很不舒服。
questions.answer: The journey is uncomfortable without enough water.
questions.answerZh: 這段旅程中沒有足夠的水會令人不舒服。
questions.highlight: The journey is uncomfortable without enough water.

questions.prompt: The plan cannot be carried out if there is not enough time.
questions.promptZh: 如果時間不足，這個計劃便無法執行。
questions.answer: The plan is impossible without enough time.
questions.answerZh: 沒有足夠時間，這個計劃便不可能實行。
questions.highlight: The plan is impossible without enough time.

questions.prompt: If the captain is absent, our team is weaker.
questions.promptZh: 如果隊長缺席，我們的隊伍會較弱。
questions.answer: Our team is weaker without its captain.
questions.answerZh: 我們的隊伍沒有隊長時會較弱。
questions.highlight: Our team is weaker without its captain.

questions.prompt: A stronger internet connection makes an online lesson smoother.
questions.promptZh: 較強的網絡連線令網上課堂更順暢。
questions.answer: An online lesson is smoother with a stronger internet connection.
questions.answerZh: 網絡連線較強時，網上課堂會更順暢。
questions.highlight: An online lesson is smoother with a stronger internet connection.

questions.prompt: The longer the wine is allowed to breathe, the more pronounced its aroma becomes.
questions.promptZh: 葡萄酒醒酒的時間越長，香氣就越明顯。
questions.answer: The wine’s aroma becomes more pronounced with longer breathing time.
questions.answerZh: 葡萄酒的香氣會隨着醒酒時間延長而變得更明顯。
questions.highlight: The wine’s aroma becomes more pronounced with longer breathing time.

questions.prompt: As the number of participants increases, a group booking gets more expensive.
questions.promptZh: 隨着參加者人數增加，團體預訂費用會變得更昂貴。
questions.answer: A group booking gets more expensive with more participants.
questions.answerZh: 參加者越多，團體預訂費用就會越昂貴。
questions.highlight: A group booking gets more expensive with more participants.

questions.prompt: The revision method works more effectively when it is used regularly.
questions.promptZh: 這種溫習方法在定期使用時會發揮更佳效果。
questions.answer: The revision method is more effective with regular use.
questions.answerZh: 這種溫習方法在定期使用下會更有效。
questions.highlight: The revision method is more effective with regular use.

questions.prompt: Adding a simple diagram makes the explanation clearer.
questions.promptZh: 加入一幅簡單圖表會令解釋更清楚。

questions.answerZh: 解釋配上一幅簡單圖表後會變得更清楚。
questions.highlight: An explanation becomes clearer with a simple diagram.

questions.prompt: Thicker curtains make the room feel warmer.
questions.promptZh: 較厚的窗簾令房間感覺更溫暖。
questions.answer: The room feels warmer with thicker curtains.
questions.answerZh: 房間使用較厚的窗簾時感覺會更溫暖。
questions.highlight: The room feels warmer with thicker curtains.

questions.promptZh: 每多放一本書，袋子便會更重。
questions.answer: A bag gets heavier with each additional book.
questions.answerZh: 袋子會隨着每一本額外加入的書而變得更重。
questions.highlight: A bag gets heavier with each additional book.

questions.prompt: The service becomes less reliable when there are fewer staff members.
questions.promptZh: 員工人數減少時，服務會變得較不可靠。
questions.answer: The service becomes less reliable with fewer staff members.
questions.answerZh: 員工人數較少時，服務會變得較不可靠。
questions.highlight: The service becomes less reliable with fewer staff members.

questions.prompt: Proper refrigeration keeps fresh food safer.
questions.promptZh: 妥善冷藏能令新鮮食物更安全。
questions.answer: Fresh food stays safer with proper refrigeration.
questions.answerZh: 新鮮食物在妥善冷藏下會較安全。
questions.highlight: Fresh food stays safer with proper refrigeration.

questions.prompt: Why is the discussion less productive? It has no clear goal.
questions.promptZh: 為甚麼這場討論成效較低？因為它沒有清晰目標。
questions.answer: The discussion is less productive without a clear goal.
questions.answerZh: 這場討論沒有清晰目標時，成效會較低。
questions.highlight: The discussion is less productive without a clear goal.

questions.prompt: More frequent services make public transport more convenient.
questions.promptZh: 更頻密的班次令公共交通更方便。
questions.answer: Public transport becomes more convenient with more frequent services.
questions.answerZh: 公共交通會隨着班次增加而變得更方便。
questions.highlight: Public transport becomes more convenient with more frequent services.

questions.prompt: Better communication allows a workplace to operate more efficiently.
questions.promptZh: 更好的溝通讓工作場所運作得更有效率。
questions.answer: A workplace is more efficient with better communication.
questions.answerZh: 工作場所具備更好的溝通時，運作會更有效率。
questions.highlight: A workplace is more efficient with better communication.

questions.prompt: The proposal is not as convincing if it has no supporting evidence.
questions.promptZh: 如果建議沒有支持證據，說服力便會較低。
questions.answer: The proposal is less convincing without supporting evidence.
questions.answerZh: 建議沒有支持證據時，說服力會較低。
questions.highlight: The proposal is less convincing without supporting evidence.

questions.prompt: Accurate measurements are necessary for the experiment to be reliable.
questions.promptZh: 準確的測量數據是確保實驗可靠的必要條件。
questions.answer: An experiment is unreliable without accurate measurements.
questions.answerZh: 沒有準確的測量數據，實驗便不可靠。
questions.highlight: An experiment is unreliable without accurate measurements.

questions.prompt: More street patrols make the neighbourhood feel safer.
questions.promptZh: 增加街道巡邏令社區感覺更安全。
questions.answer: The neighbourhood feels safer with more street patrols.
questions.answerZh: 社區有更多街道巡邏時會令人感覺更安全。
questions.highlight: The neighbourhood feels safer with more street patrols.

questions.prompt: Recorded lessons make online learning more accessible.
questions.promptZh: 錄影課堂令網上學習更容易使用。
questions.answer: Online learning is more accessible with recorded lessons.
questions.answerZh: 網上學習配合錄影課堂時會更容易使用。
questions.highlight: Online learning is more accessible with recorded lessons.

questions.prompt: Why is the decision harder? Complete information is unavailable.
questions.promptZh: 為甚麼這個決定更難作出？因為完整資料並不可得。
questions.answer: The decision is harder without complete information.
questions.answerZh: 沒有完整資料時，這個決定會更難作出。
questions.highlight: The decision is harder without complete information.

questions.prompt: Regular updates make the software more useful.
questions.promptZh: 定期更新令這套軟件更加實用。
questions.answer: The software becomes more useful with regular updates.
questions.answerZh: 這套軟件會隨着定期更新而變得更加實用。
questions.highlight: The software becomes more useful with regular updates.

questions.prompt: When there are fewer cars on the road, the air is cleaner.
questions.promptZh: 道路上的車輛較少時，空氣會更潔淨。
questions.answer: The air is cleaner with fewer cars on the road.
questions.answerZh: 道路上的車輛較少時，空氣會更潔淨。
questions.highlight: The air is cleaner with fewer cars on the road.

questions.prompt: The presentation is less engaging if it contains no visual examples.
questions.promptZh: 如果簡報沒有視覺例子，吸引力便會較低。
questions.answer: A presentation is less engaging without visual examples.
questions.answerZh: 簡報沒有視覺例子時，吸引力會較低。
questions.highlight: A presentation is less engaging without visual examples.

questions.prompt: The wine tastes smoother after it has had more time to breathe.
questions.promptZh: 葡萄酒經過較長時間醒酒後，口感會更順滑。
questions.answer: The wine tastes smoother with more time to breathe.
questions.answerZh: 葡萄酒有更多時間醒酒時，口感會更順滑。
questions.highlight: The wine tastes smoother with more time to breathe.

questions.prompt: Two-step verification makes the system more secure.
questions.promptZh: 雙重驗證令系統更加安全。
questions.answer: The system is more secure with two-step verification.
questions.answerZh: 系統採用雙重驗證時會更加安全。
questions.highlight: The system is more secure with two-step verification.

questions.prompt: If early testing is not carried out, the project becomes riskier.
questions.promptZh: 如果沒有進行早期測試，項目會變得風險更高。
questions.answer: A project becomes riskier without early testing.
questions.answerZh: 項目沒有早期測試時會變得風險更高。
questions.highlight: A project becomes riskier without early testing.

questions.prompt: Soundproof windows make the room quieter.
questions.promptZh: 隔音窗令房間更加安靜。
questions.answer: The room is quieter with soundproof windows.
questions.answerZh: 房間裝有隔音窗時會更加安靜。
questions.highlight: The room is quieter with soundproof windows.

questions.prompt: Numbered steps make the instructions easier to follow.
questions.promptZh: 編上號碼的步驟令指示更容易跟從。
questions.answer: Instructions are easier to follow with numbered steps.
questions.answerZh: 指示配上編號步驟後會更容易跟從。
questions.highlight: Instructions are easier to follow with numbered steps.

questions.prompt: Proper enforcement is necessary for the policy to be effective.
questions.promptZh: 妥善執法是政策發揮成效的必要條件。
questions.answer: A policy is ineffective without proper enforcement.
questions.answerZh: 政策沒有妥善執行便無法發揮成效。
questions.highlight: A policy is ineffective without proper enforcement.

questions.prompt: Regular maintenance allows the machine to work more accurately.
questions.promptZh: 定期保養讓機器運作得更準確。
questions.answer: The machine is more accurate with regular maintenance.
questions.answerZh: 機器在定期保養下會更準確。
questions.highlight: The machine is more accurate with regular maintenance.

questions.prompt: Clearer communication leads to a more positive public response.
questions.promptZh: 更清晰的溝通會帶來更正面的公眾反應。

questions.prompt: The more effort the team spends on development, the more effective the product becomes.
questions.promptZh: 團隊在開發上投入越多努力，產品就會變得越有效。

questions.highlight: The product becomes more effective with more effort spent on development.

questions.prompt: Why is the warning less useful? It gives no specific advice.
questions.promptZh: 為甚麼這項警告較沒有用？因為它沒有提供具體建議。
questions.answer: A warning is less useful without specific advice.
questions.answerZh: 警告沒有具體建議時，作用會較小。
questions.highlight: A warning is less useful without specific advice.

questions.prompt: Careful planning reduces the risk of long-term projects.

questions.prompt: Meaningful examples make a language lesson easier to remember.

questions.highlight: A language lesson is more memorable with meaningful examples.

questions.prompt: Evidence from several sources makes the research conclusion more trustworthy.

questions.highlight: A research conclusion is more trustworthy with evidence from several sources.

questions.prompt: A city becomes less liveable if affordable housing is unavailable.

questions.answer: A city becomes less liveable without affordable housing.
questions.answerZh: 城市沒有可負擔房屋時會變得較不宜居。

questions.highlight: Team decisions are fairer with input from different members.

questions.prompt: A training programme works more effectively when enough time is provided for practice.
questions.promptZh: 如果提供足夠練習時間，培訓課程會發揮更佳成效。
questions.answer: A training programme is more effective with enough time for practice.
questions.answerZh: 培訓課程有足夠練習時間時會更有效。
questions.highlight: A training programme is more effective with enough time for practice.

questions.prompt: The longer the sauce rests, the more pronounced its flavour becomes.
questions.promptZh: 醬汁靜置的時間越長，味道就越明顯。
questions.answer: The flavour becomes more pronounced with a longer resting period.

questions.prompt: As demand increases, the tickets become less affordable.

questions.answer: The tickets become less affordable with higher demand.

questions.highlight: The tickets become less affordable with higher demand.

questions.prompt: Long-term public support is essential for sustainable development.
questions.promptZh: 長期公眾支持是可持續發展的必要條件。
questions.answer: Sustainable development is impossible without long-term public support.
questions.answerZh: 沒有長期公眾支持，可持續發展便不可能實現。
questions.highlight: Sustainable development is impossible without long-term public support.
